prompt: 检测漂移: US-012 在 Jira 中状态为 Done，但 UPM 中对应需求条目仍显示 In Progress

assertions.name: detects_drift
assertions.description: Should detect the status inconsistency between story and UPM

assertions.name: shows_delta
assertions.description: Should show the delta between story status and UPM status

assertions.name: recommends_action
assertions.description: Should recommend a sync action to resolve the drift
